spec_match.rationale: Probes navigator.gpu.wgslLanguageFeatures for subgroup extensions — correct feature detection gate.

interactive.rationale: Button triggers real WGSL feature probe with status readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises feature gate detection; delivers working probe.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles unsupported gracefully but doesn't test adapter-level subgroup support.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested via chrome-devtools-mcp: probed WGSL features, clean fallback. No console errors.
